v5.1_changes_vs_v5.0: CharacterRegistry shared object — chain-side one-character-per-wallet gate
OpenWagerRegistry shared object — chain-side one-open-wager-per-wallet gate
KioskRegistry shared object — chain-side one-kiosk-per-wallet gate
Character.draws: u32 field — chain-side W/L/D record
Item.slot_type: u8 field — chain-side enforcement of mainhand/offhand/both_hands trinity
arena::settle_tie — mutual-KO settlement, 100% refund both sides, no platform fee, emits WagerTied
character::update_after_fight_draw — bumps draws counter, applies XP, no rating change
character::burn_character — admin-gated character delete + registry clear
item::mint_item_admin rarity stat budgets — sum of all *_bonus + max_damage capped per rarity (Common=20, Uncommon=40, Rare=70, Epic=110, Legendary=160)
item::mint_item_admin takes slot_type param + validates shape per item_type
equip_weapon enforces slot_type=mainhand OR both_hands; two-handed requires empty offhand
equip_offhand blocks both-handed items; blocks offhand when current weapon is two-handed; requires shield to be slot_offhand
deferred_to_v5.2: sui::random for loot rolls (D1) — trust-bundle item, ~80 lines Move + bonus-distribution logic
Three new equipment slots (D5) — feature-creep beyond audit scope
respec_character (D7) — 5 SUI sink + 24h cooldown via DOF, player-facing financial flow

operational_followups.display_setup: Not done in Phase 2. Need to call display::new<Character> + display::new<Item> via Publisher to create Display objects (mirrors v5.0). Recommend bundling with the v5.1 catalog mint script.
operational_followups.catalog_mint: Not done in Phase 2. v5.1 catalog re-mint (22 starter + 9 Lv6-Lv8 items) with new slot_type field needs scripts/mint-v5.1-catalog.ts. Two-handed weapons (Cursed Greatsword, Skullcrusher Maul, Steel Greatsword) get slot_type=2; shields get slot_type=1; everything else slot_type=0.
operational_followups.wallet_transfers: After re-mint, transfer NFTs to Mr_Boss + Sx test wallets (same split as v5.0).
operational_followups.env_update: When ready to switch the server to v5.1: update server/.env's SUI_PACKAGE_ID, ADMIN_CAP_ID, TRANSFER_POLICY_ID, plus add OPEN_WAGER_REGISTRY_ID, CHARACTER_REGISTRY_ID, KIOSK_REGISTRY_ID. Same for frontend/.env.local. v5.0 server keeps running on v5.0 IDs in the meantime.
